text:
Once upon a time there was a wise old owl named Harold. Harold lived in a majestic oak tree in the center of a meadow. Every morning Harold would wake up to the serene chirping of birds and the gentle rustling of leaves. One day Harold flew down from his perch to investigate a strange noise coming from the forest.

As Harold approached the source, he saw a tiny, baby bear munching on some acorns. Evenngly. Harold flew down and placed a small feathered leaf on the bear's head.

"Hello there," boomed Harold. "You've got some big bear muscles there. Want some acorns?

The little bear blinked twice at Harold. "Hey! That's my bear stuff! Can I borrow yours? I have lots of acorns!

The wise owl tilted his head. "Well, you could try... Oh... Oh boy.

The baby bear giggled. "I'll have a great big meal! You know some really funny stories about
